entries.round: task:The user wants to build a B2B 'AI system that helps SaaS companies automatically convert visitors into customers'. Conduct a deep technical and product analysis. 1. Define the Core Features (e.g., AI Chatbot for sales, Predictive Lead Scoring, Dynamic Personalization, Automated Follow-ups). 2. Propose a High-Level Architecture (Data Ingestion tracking user behavior, AI Processing Engine, Integration/Widget layer). 3. Recommend a modern, scalable Tech Stack. Output this detailed analysis by overwriting 'spec.md' using <write_file> tags.
